# Support

## Getting Help

- **Documentation**: See the [README](../README.md), the API docs on
  [docs.rs/ramqp](https://docs.rs/ramqp), and the runnable
  [`examples/`](../examples)
- **Issues**: Search [existing issues](https://github.com/ZerosAndOnesLLC/rAMQP/issues) before opening a new one
- **Security**: Report vulnerabilities to support@zerosandones.us (see [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md))

## Reporting Issues

1. Check if the issue already exists
2. Use the appropriate issue template:
   - [Bug Report](ISSUE_TEMPLATE/bug_report.md)
   - [Feature Request](ISSUE_TEMPLATE/feature_request.md)
3. Include your ramqp version, Rust version, the broker (and version), the Cargo
   features enabled, a minimal reproducing snippet, and logs where useful

## Commercial Support

For commercial support, consulting, or enterprise deployments, contact:

**support@zerosandones.us**
